testReportSummary: Build succeeded with CS1591 as WarningsAsErrors and GenerateDocumentationFile enabled (0 warnings). All 59 existing tests pass. 26 new integration tests were written and all pass, covering: IterationMetrics computed properties (PassRate/IntegrationPassRate), MetricsTracker full disk roundtrip with field preservation, camelCase JSON serialization, 3-digit file naming, MetricsComparison.ToString format, HasRegressed boundary conditions, ImprovementAnalyzer.BuildRequests prompt content and history trends, ImprovementRequest record equality, and XML documentation file presence/content validation. The generated CopilotHive.xml contains 131 documented members including all Metrics and Improvement types with <summary>, <param>, <returns>, and <remarks> tags.
